text.title: iac-patterns-dry Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for iac-patterns-dry as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using count for resources where the list can change.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: count = length(var.items) means items[0] is aws_s3_bucket.main[0]. Removing item 0 makes item 1 become item 0, triggering a destroy/recreate of an unrelated resource.
